title: Worldborder Tweaks
body:
A client-side Fabric mod that provides some worldborder tweaks.

![*With this mod, any blocks beyond the border are not visible, as well as the border texture*](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7afa2d0b7ccc850a37309ad197e9651f32a90225_0.webp)

![*You can experience same feeling like was in Old World generation in MCPE!*](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce18ba7dacc60e1e52178f444b95cad51a0a3b1c_0.webp)

### Features
- Hide blocks beyond border - Completely removes rendering of all blocks outside the worldborder (Sodium compatible)
- Remove red vignette - Disables the red screen overlay effect
- Hide border visual - Makes the worldborder barrier invisible

_With the default settings, you will get the same look as in the old world in MCPE._
